content: {"file": "backend/ado_mcp/ado_client.py", "summary": "This file contains a Python class AdoMcpClient that acts as an interface to interact with a local Node.js Azure DevOps MCP server. It provides methods for creating work items such as epics, user stories, and tasks by invoking corresponding tools on the MCP server.", "rules": [{"name": "_server_config", "description": "Returns configuration settings required to connect to the MCP server including command, arguments, transport method, and environment variables.", "conditions": ["settings.MCP_SERVER_PATH is not None"], "actions": ["Return dictionary with necessary configurations"]}, {"name": "_parse_tool_result", "description": "Parses the result returned by an MCP tool into a JSON object containing id and url fields.", "conditions": ["result can be dict, str or list of dicts"], "actions": ["Convert result to expected JSON format"]}, {"name": "AdoMcpClient.__init__", "description": "Initializes AdoMcpClient with an MCP client instance and a dictionary for storing tools by name.", "conditions": [], "actions": ["Create MultiServerMCPClient instance", "Initialize _tools_by_name as None"]}, {"name": "AdoMcpClient._get_tool", "description": "Retrieves the specified tool from the MCP server if not already cached and raises an error if the tool is missing.", "conditions": ["tool name provided"], "actions": ["Fetch tools from MCP client", "Store in _tools_by_name dictionary", "Raise RuntimeError if tool does not exist"]}, {"name": "AdoMcpClient.create_epic", "description": "Invokes the create_epic tool on the MCP server with given parameters and returns parsed result.", "conditions": ["title, description, tags provided"], "actions": ["Invoke create_epic tool", "Return parsed JSON object"]}, {"name": "AdoMcpClient.create_user_story", "description": "Invokes the create_user_story tool on the MCP server with given parameters and returns parsed result.", "conditions": ["parent_id, title, description, tags provided"], "actions": ["Invoke create_user_story tool", "Return parsed JSON object"]}, {"name": "AdoMcpClient.create_task", "description": "Invokes the create_task tool on the MCP server with given parameters and returns parsed result.", "conditions": ["parent_id, title, description, tags, activity provided"], "actions": ["Invoke create_task tool", "Return parsed JSON object"]}], "dependencies": ["config.settings", "langchain_mcp_adapters.client.MultiServerMCPClient"]}
